steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: The triangles are congruent. Since $A$ corresponds to $D$ and both $B$ and $E$ are right angles, the remaining angles $C$ and $F$ correspond.

steps.title: Find the remaining angle
steps.content:
In triangle $ABC$, the angles sum to $180^\circ$.
$$27+90+C=180$$
$$C=63$$

steps.title: Transfer the measure
steps.content: Corresponding angles in congruent triangles have equal measures, so angle $F$ has the same measure as angle $C$. The answer is B.
